title: MuslinZ Muslin Cloths for Baby - Baby Burp Cloths - 6 Pack Muslin Squares - Large 70x70cm - Pure Cotton - Soft, Absorbent & Breathable - Multi Use Newborn Cloths - UK Brand (Blue)
features: Quality: Award winning MuslinZ baby muslins are made from premium quality fabric, a 6 pack of large 70x70cm muslin squares, providing a soft and gentle touch for your little one.

Newborn Essential: our Muslin Cloths have so many uses when feeding or caring for your baby. Use as a Baby Burp Cloth, Feeding Cover, Dribble Catcher, Changing Mat Cover. As a Newborn Swaddle, for Swaddle Bathing or as a Reusable Nappy.

Lightweight and Breathable: Our soft baby muslins are lightweight and breathable, ensuring your baby stays comfortable and doesn't overheat. The open-weave design allows for air circulation, making it perfect for use year-round.
MuslinZ brand: Designed in the UK, with a range of exclusive prints, to meet the highest quality and safety. Made with care to Oeko Tex 100 Standard.

Easy to Care For: Our baby muslins are easy to care for, they can be machine washed and are quick to dry. Making them a newborn baby must have for every busy new parent. They are durable, ensuring that it can withstand the wear and tear of everyday use. Buy well - buy once.
description: Product Description Why Choose MuslinZ Soft & Lightweight Baby muslin cloths made from 100% soft cotton—lightweight, breathable, and safe from birth. A must-have for every baby bag. Ultra-absorbent Ultra-absorbent, durable muslin squares – perfect as a newborn reusable nappy, baby burp cloth, mopping up spills and so much more! Generous Size & Versatile Generous 70x70cm size— An all-in-one baby essential perfect for feeding, cleaning, changing, and soothing. A parenting must-have! Easy Care - Machine washable For best results, machine wash at 40°C and tumble dry on a low heat. Pre-wash before first use is recommended to maximise softness and absorbency. MuslinZ Exclusive Designs At MuslinZ, every print and product is thoughtfully designed by our Oxfordshire-based team, combining softness and style with the everyday practicality parents need. High-quality, ethical, affordable—MuslinZ is baby care you can trust. About us British Brand We’re proud to be a British brand dedicated to creating high-quality baby essentials. Founded in 2012 and based in Oxfordshire. Passion For Textiles We’re passionate about textiles and know how important it is for baby products to deliver on performance, safety, and softness. Sustainability At The Heart Sustainability is key at MuslinZ: local sourcing, sea freight, recyclable packaging, and conscious practices help reduce our carbon footprint. Made With Care Our ISO, Sedex & Oeko-Tex certified factories ensure products meet Oeko-Tex 100—safe, non-toxic & gentle for babies and the planet.
